summary: Comprehensive testing of Takt Time industrial application v2 completed. All backend APIs (31/31) working perfectly. All new features implemented: Sites management, Screen/TV management, Statistics with CSV export, Enhanced line config with weekly schedules. Previous navigation issue from iteration 1 RESOLVED.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about missing DialogContent descriptions
design_issues.workaround: Functional impact: none. Accessibility warnings only.

passed_tests: All backend API endpoints (31/31 passed) - Sites, Screens, Lines, Events, Statistics, CSV Export
Site Management CRUD - Create, Read, Update, Delete operations
Screen Management with IP tracking and ping functionality
Statistics page with line selection and date filtering
CSV Export functionality with proper file download
Enhanced Dashboard with site filtering dropdown
Line configuration with weekly schedules and team management
Previous iteration 1 navigation issue RESOLVED - /config/new route now works
Real-time WebSocket updates and timer functionality

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 31 API endpoints working perfectly, complete CRUD operations for all entities
success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major functionality working, minor console warnings only
